text.autoconfig.stonevault.title: Stonevaults Configuration
text.autoconfig.stonevault.option.GENERA: Displays a welcome message when a player joins the world.
text.autoconfig.stonevault.option.MAGETO: Controls how many jigsaw expansions are attempted for Mage Towers.
Controls how many jigsaw expansions are attempted for Igloos.
text.autoconfig.stonevault.option.DUNGEO: Controls how many jigsaw expansions are attempted for Dungeons.
text.autoconfig.stonevault.option.PILLAG: Controls how many jigsaw expansions are attempted for Pillager Dungeons.
advancement.stonevaults.enter_dungeon.de: Venture into a forgotten dungeon filled with danger and hidden treasures.
advancement.stonevaults.enter_mage_tower: Ascend a mysterious tower where ancient magic still lingers.
advancement.stonevaults.enter_igloo.desc: Uncover a secluded shelter buried beneath the endless snow.
advancement.stonevaults.enter_pillager_d: Infiltrate a fortified dungeon controlled by ruthless pillagers.
